title: Goldman Sachs' Forecast of China's Economy

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Goldman Sachs' Forecast of China's Economy

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: As an AI language model, I do not have access to up-to-date information regarding current or future economic forecasts. However, according to a report by Goldman Sachs in September 2021, they expect China's economy to grow at a rate of 8.3% in 2021, fueled by robust exports and manufacturing activity. They also project a slightly slower growth rate of 5.5% in 2022 due to potential headwinds from domestic consumption and regulatory tightening.
